# Maintain London

> High-end home renovation company serving Southwest London and Surrey since 2015. Specialists in luxury kitchen design, bathroom renovations, house extensions, and full property transformations for homes valued at £1m+.

## Company Overview

Maintain London is a premium home renovation company based in Walton-on-Thames, serving Southwest London and Surrey. Established in 2015, we have completed over 500 high-end renovation projects with a 98% client satisfaction rate and a team of 25+ expert craftsmen.

## Services

- [Home Renovations](https://maintainlondon.co.uk/services/renovations/): Full property transformations preserving period character while introducing modern luxury. 10-year structural warranty included.
- [Kitchen Design & Installation](https://maintainlondon.co.uk/services/kitchens/): Bespoke luxury kitchens with handcrafted cabinetry, smart home integration, and 3D visualisation. 150+ luxury kitchens delivered.
- [Bathroom Design & Installation](https://maintainlondon.co.uk/services/bathrooms/): Spa-inspired sanctuaries featuring Italian marble, wellness technology, and sustainable fixtures.
- [House Extensions](https://maintainlondon.co.uk/services/extensions/): Architectural extensions that seamlessly integrate with existing properties. 75+ successful extensions completed.

## Service Area

Southwest London and Surrey including: Richmond, Chelsea, Hampstead, Walton-on-Thames, Wimbledon, Putney, Fulham, Kingston, Esher, Cobham, Weybridge, and surrounding areas.

## Key Information

- Address: 5 Garden Road, Walton-on-Thames, KT12 2HQ
- Phone: 020 3886 2023
- Email: team@maintainlondon.co.uk
- Hours: Mon-Fri 8:00-18:00, Sat 9:00-14:00
- Website: https://maintainlondon.co.uk

## Typical Investment Ranges

- Kitchen renovations: £50,000 - £150,000
- Bathroom renovations: £25,000 - £75,000
- House extensions: £100,000 - £500,000+
- Full home renovations: Contact for bespoke quote

## Guarantees

- 10-year structural warranty
- 2-year craftsmanship guarantee
- Manufacturer warranties on all fixtures and appliances
- Public liability insurance up to £5 million
- Professional indemnity insurance up to £2 million
